subcodes.first_line: Ṣafí-'Alí-Sháh is well aware of the mystery and wisdom of this matter, yet hath posed this question in accordance with wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: صفی علی شاه مطّلع بر سرّ و حکمت این مسئله هستند ولی نظر بحکمتی این سؤال را نموده‌اند
subcodes.subjects: @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @apostles; early disciples of Christ
